jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Resonance
jsonLd.description:
Join the Resonance family as a Instructional Designer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Resonance:
Resonance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
